title: limonium calcarae
intro: Limonium calcarae, also known as the Italian sea lavender or calcareous sea lavender, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Limonium calcarae include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Limonium calcarae are typically made from its leaves, flowers, and roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
